[vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" bg_color="#ffffff" scene_position="center" top_padding="6%" bottom_padding="3%" text_color="dark" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.3" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="padding-5-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/1" tablet_width_inherit="default"][vc_column_text]

Brand Collaborations & Creative Campaigns – Suli Breaks

Suli Breaks works with brands and institutions that understand the power of authentic storytelling. Whether through a voiceover, a bespoke written piece, or a full creative campaign, Suli brings a voice and a perspective that cuts through — one that has already resonated with millions of people around the world. Past collaborators include Nike, BBC, Meta, BT, and Microsoft.

Voiceovers and Narration

Suli's voice is one of his most distinctive assets — measured, authoritative, and immediately recognisable. He has provided voiceovers for brand films, documentary narration, advertising campaigns, and institutional content. Each voiceover project includes script consultation to ensure the language sounds natural in his voice and lands with the intended audience. Remote recording is available, or Suli can attend a studio session.

Bespoke Poetry and Written Pieces

Organisations commission Suli to write original pieces for specific purposes — a brand film script, a cultural moment, an internal campaign, or a public-facing piece tied to a product or values statement. The brief process typically involves an initial discovery call, a written brief from the organisation, one or two drafts with feedback, and a final delivered piece.

Creative Campaigns

For brands looking to build something larger — a content series, a social campaign, or an ongoing creative partnership — Suli can serve as a creative collaborator across the life of a project. This includes concept development, script and copy, performance, and content strategy informed by his deep understanding of how storytelling works in culture.

Values and Fit

Suli is selective about the brands he works with. He takes on projects where there is a genuine alignment between his creative voice and the brand's purpose. He does not lend his name or voice to campaigns that conflict with his values around authenticity, social responsibility, and representation.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row] [vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" bg_color="#f5f4f2" scene_position="center" top_padding="4%" bottom_padding="5%" text_color="dark" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.3" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="padding-5-percent" column_padding_position="all" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/1" tablet_width_inherit="default"][vc_column_text]

Frequently Asked Questions

[/vc_column_text] [vc_toggle title="What does a typical collaboration process look like?" el_id="what-does-a-typical-collaboration-process-look-like" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]It starts with a brief call to understand the project, followed by a written proposal covering scope, timeline, and fee. For voiceover and written pieces, the timeline is typically 2–4 weeks from brief to delivery. For ongoing creative partnerships, we agree a retainer or project-based structure.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="What are the usage rights for commissioned work?" el_id="what-are-the-usage-rights-for-commissioned-work" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Usage rights are agreed per project. Standard terms cover one platform or medium for a defined period. Broader usage rights — multi-platform, international, or in perpetuity — are available at an additional fee.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="Can Suli appear on camera as well as provide a voiceover?" el_id="can-suli-appear-on-camera-as-well-as-provide-a-voiceover" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Yes. Suli is available for on-camera appearances as a talent collaborator — interviews, presenting, documentary participation, and performance-to-camera. On-camera projects are scoped separately from voiceover-only work.[/vc_toggle] [vc_toggle title="How do I start a brand collaboration enquiry?" el_id="how-do-i-start-a-brand-collaboration-enquiry" style="default" size="md" color="Default"]Send a brief description of the project via the Get in Touch form, including the type of deliverable, your timeline, and any relevant context about the brand or campaign. We respond within 48 hours.[/vc_toggle] [/vc_column][/vc_row] [vc_row type="full_width_background" full_screen_row_position="middle" column_margin="default" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" bg_color="#000000" scene_position="center" top_padding="70" bottom_padding="70" text_color="light" text_align="left" row_border_radius="none" row_border_radius_applies="bg" overlay_strength="0.95" gradient_direction="left_to_right" shape_divider_position="bottom" bg_image_animation="none"][vc_column column_padding="no-extra-padding" column_padding_position="all" centered_text="true" background_color_opacity="1" column_shadow="none" column_border_radius="none" column_link_target="_self" width="1/2" tablet_width_inherit="default"][split_line_heading animation_type="line-reveal-by-space" font_style="h2" text_content="Want to work together?"][/split_line_heading][divider line_type="No Line" custom_height="20"][nectar_btn size="jumbo" button_style="regular" button_color_2="Accent-Color" icon_family="default_arrow" text="Book Suli" url="/contact/" css_animation="fadeIn"][/vc_column][/vc_row]
